---
title: "Cross Validation"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

# Cross Validation

```{r}

#Get the clean data from the proposal.qmd

head(song_level)

```

```{r}
#Maybe seed
#set.seed(123) 

n <- nrow(song_level)
train_index <- sample(1:n, size = 0.8 * n)

train_data <- song_level[train_index, ]
test_data  <- song_level[-train_index, ]
```

```{r}

library(dplyr)

train_data <- train_data %>%
  select(multi_artist, Danceability, Energy, Speechiness,
         Acousticness, Valence, days_in_top200, avg_rank_score)

test_data <- test_data %>%
  select(multi_artist, Danceability, Energy, Speechiness,
         Acousticness, Valence, days_in_top200, avg_rank_score)
```

```{r}
#Predictions for days in top 200

#install.packages("caret")
library(caret)

set.seed(124)

train_control <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 10)

model <- train(
  days_in_top200 ~ multi_artist + Danceability + Energy + Speechiness + Acousticness + Valence,
  data = song_level,
  method = "lm",
  trControl = train_control
)


```

```{r}
preds <- predict(model, newdata = test_data)
# Mean Squared Error
mse <- mean((test_data$days_in_top200 - preds)^2)

# Root MSE
rmse <- sqrt(mse)

rmse
cor(test_data$days_in_top200, preds)
```

```{r}
#For comparison
sd(song_level$days_in_top200)
mean(song_level$days_in_top200)

```

```{r}
set.seed(124)

train_control <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 10)

model <- train(
  avg_rank_score ~ multi_artist + Danceability + Energy + Speechiness + Acousticness + Valence,
  data = song_level,
  method = "lm",
  trControl = train_control
)

preds <- predict(model, newdata = test_data)

# Mean Squared Error
mse <- mean((test_data$avg_rank_score - preds)^2)

# Root MSE
rmse <- sqrt(mse)

rmse
cor(test_data$avg_rank_score, preds)

```

```{r}
#For comparison
sd(song_level$avg_rank_score)
mean(song_level$avg_rank_score)

```
